## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` passes locally with no new warnings.
- [ ] I tested this against a real Jellyfin instance (server + web client).
- [ ] I hard-refreshed the web client and confirmed the change works on a clean cache.
- [ ] Documentation (README / CHANGELOG) updated if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] PR is scoped to a single logical change.
- [ ] Branch name follows `feat/` / `fix/` / `docs/` convention.
